caption: A male news presenter with glasses, wearing a dark suit, a white shirt, and a maroon tie, stands before a digital backdrop in a news studio. The background consists of a blue world map and circular graphic elements, with the text "PLUS POLITICS" prominently displayed in white capital letters. On the left side of the frame, a red vertical banner features a white logo and the word "plus tv". At the bottom of the screen, a white ticker provides viewing information: "WATCH ON DStv CH 408" and "StarTimes CH 308". As the sequence progresses, a lower-third graphic appears, identifying the presenter as "KOFI BARTELS" and providing his social media handle "@KOFIBARTELS". The presenter remains centered in the frame, maintaining a steady gaze toward the camera with minimal movement in his posture and expression throughout the clip.
